_note: Fictitious data simulating Microsoft 365 Copilot retrieval. No real M365 connection — content stays on-device.

scenarios.label: Reply to Dr. Patel about the budget meeting
scenarios.user_prompt_example: Draft a reply to Dr. Patel about the FY26 budget meeting. Confirm Thursday and ask for the latest spreadsheet.

context.title: Re: FY26 Budget Meeting — agenda
context.snippet: Hi Sam — confirming Thursday at 2 PM in COOR 174. I'll bring the draft personnel lines; can you bring the latest operating-budget spreadsheet? Also looping in J. Lin from finance.

context.title: Advising Leadership · 'budget' channel
context.snippet: FYI the FY26 operating template now has the new chart-of-accounts mappings — please use v3 (link in SharePoint), not the v2 from last month.

context.title: FY26_Operating_Budget_v3.xlsx
context.snippet: Sheet 'Advising' updated through Q1 actuals. Tabs: Personnel, Operations, Travel, One-Time. Approval workflow: advisor lead → director → finance partner.

scenarios.label: Summarize this week for the new hire
scenarios.user_prompt_example: Write a quick summary of this week's onboarding-related items for the new advisor starting Monday.

context.title: New advisor — first-day logistics
context.snippet: New hire R. Gomez starts Monday 8:30 AM. Meet in COOR 110. Sun Card pickup is 9:30 at MU. I'll handle Workday tasks 10-11.

context.title: Advising team chat
context.snippet: Please cover R. Gomez's first 1:1 cycle next week — 30 min each. Also ping me with onboarding-buddy assignments by Friday.

context.title: Advising_Onboarding_30-60-90.docx
context.snippet: Updated 30/60/90 plan now reflects new Salesforce Advising Console rollout. Add the 'Console basics' module before week 2.

scenarios.label: Where's the policy on late-add petitions?
scenarios.user_prompt_example: Find me the latest policy on late-add petitions and summarize the key changes since last year.

context.title: KB-2041_Late-add_petitions.md
context.snippet: Petitions accepted within 5 weeks of term start. Requires instructor approval and documented qualifying reason. Submitted via PeopleSoft > Records > Petition Workflow. Hard cutoff: end of week 6.

context.title: Policy update — late-add now week 5
context.snippet: FYI: late-add window shortened from 6 weeks to 5 weeks effective Fall '25. Hard cutoff (week 6) unchanged. Update your student-facing language.

context.title: Advising Leadership channel
context.snippet: Reminder: petitions still require a documented qualifying reason. Verbal claims aren't sufficient — get it in writing or via the standardized form.
